calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Scott (Petitioner in pro per).

At the Court's invitation, Mr. Scott presented endorsed-filed copies of various waivers and a Proof of Subscribing Witness for review. He also represented to the Court that he had a proof of service for the Notice of Hearing which had not yet been filed with the Clerk (which document was thereafter so filed and a copy of the same submitted to the Court after hearing). Since neither the Court nor the Examiner had sufficient time to review the documents so presented, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: Stella Pantazis, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Jimmy Peralta; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnson.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Continued To Feb-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Martin Scott appearing in pro per. He has contacted the witness to the Will. He will file a proof of subscribing witness. Matter is continued to 2/14.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
